title: Groups not collapsing
excerpt: My groups will collapse in my main board but not the boards i have filers on ?  This was working last week and now when i collapse nothing happens ?

posts.author: JadeLouise (JadeLouise)
posts.cookedHtml: My groups will collapse in my main board but not the boards i have filers on ? This was working last week and now when i collapse nothing happens ?

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JadeLouise !

This sounds like a bug with monday.com. I would suggest emailing the Monday.com Support team at support@monday.com with a Loom video showing the issue and all the troubleshooting issues that you have done before in the email also.

(Ex. tried in an incognito mode, tried in anther browser, cleared cache, etc.)
